title: Kimberly-Clark 2025 Annual Report on Form 10-K
note: Primary source for business description, brand portfolio, raw materials, competition, customer concentration, IFP transaction context, and Kenvue acquisition disclosure.

title: Kimberly-Clark - Our Brands
note: Official brand and category source for Huggies, Kleenex, Kotex, Scott, Cottonelle, Depend, and Kimberly-Clark Professional positioning.

title: Kimberly-Clark Announces First Quarter 2026 Results, Reaffirms 2026 Outlook
note: Latest quarterly source for net sales, operating profit, net income, organic growth, debt, outlook, and pending Kenvue transaction context.

title: Huggies US Homepage
note: Official product source for Huggies diapers, wipes, preemie diaper positioning, leak protection, skin comfort, and parent tools.

title: Kleenex US Homepage
note: Official product source for Kleenex facial tissues, product formats, Clean Shield positioning, lotion, anti-viral, and hand towel lines.

title: Kimberly-Clark (KMB) - Market capitalization
note: Market-data source for Kimberly-Clark market capitalization and market-cap history.

title: Kimberly-Clark (KMB) - P/E ratio
note: Market-data source for Kimberly-Clark trailing price-to-earnings ratio.

title: Paper and Paperboard: Material-Specific Data
note: Paper and paperboard waste, recycling, combustion, and landfill data used to frame recovered-fiber and single-use paper pressure.

title: Cloth versus disposable diapers: an exploratory study on family habits
note: Analysis source supporting the ongoing viability of cloth diaper use and the conditions for reusable-service alternatives.

title: A Big Bang for Plastic Recycling
note: Open plastic recycling and local workspace source used as an enabling primitive for reusable packaging and local materials loops.

title: Global Village Construction Set
note: Open-source industrial machine source used as an enabling primitive for microfactory and local production concepts.

title: Materiom
note: Open biomaterials data and community source used as an enabling primitive for local materials and packaging experimentation.
